name: Fern and Frieren | Cleansing Conundrum
description:
Original Image before nerf:

Yes, you’ve heard it right, more Fern, because I live her series so damn much. Maybe Frieren soon, who knows. This description won’t be too long, I’m literally creating this on zero hours of sleep, and since going to sleep is a pain, I’m doing this to pass a little bit of time. More bots incoming, since I got some stuff to offload. I got like multiple bots I can import from other sites I have used.

In this, you have multiple characters. Both Frieren and Fern. I dunno if Frieren will act as she’s supposed to act, and just be utterly zoinked out, but you’ll definitely see
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
